title: Innodata (INOD) Stock Forecast and Price Target 2026
text: INOD Stock Price Technical Analysis 2026. Recent Price Action: Stock traded sideways in low-to-mid $40s through late April 2026. Closes clustered between $40 and $47, building tight base. May 7, 2026 closed at $45.64, then ripped to $84.89 next day with intraday high near $91.88. One session later printed high of $114.77, closing at $102.30. Analyst Price Targets: Current price target $105.00. Two analysts rate INOD with Buy consensus as of May 15, 2026. Technical Indicators: Trading near top of 52-week range and above 200-day simple moving average. INOD considered Strong Sell with 17 technical analysis indicators: 1 Buy signal, 12 Sell signals, 4 Neutral signals. Fundamental Catalyst: Dramatic price surge driven by earnings. Q1 2026 revenue jumped 54% year-over-year to $90.1M. Adjusted EBITDA nearly doubled to $25M. Adjusted gross margin expanded to 47%. Management raised full-year 2026 revenue growth guidance from 35%+ to roughly 40%+ year-over-year.
